name: Cinnamon Walnut Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, walnuts, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Whisk together the eggs and whipping cream in another bowl. Stir into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
3. Turn onto a lightly floured surface and gently pat into an 7-inch circle, about 3/4 inch thick.
4. Cut into eight wedges with a sharp knife.
5. Arrange the wedges on a greased baking sheet, brushing tops with buttermilk.
6. Let rest for 15 minutes before baking at 450°F (230°C) for 14-16 minutes or until golden brown.
